titleStmt.title: SII 36.286: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 286. (A.R. No. 286 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Tiruvālīśvara temple.

summary.p: The king remitted taxes on lands and on cheṭṭis, kaikkōḷas, vāṇiyar, cekku-vāṇiyar, and also on all the members designated as kācāyam group (kācāya-vargam) and those settled in the quarters of the temple of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Vittūr in favour of the temple for meeting the expenses on festivals and other services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Irācanārāyaṇaṉ campūrāyaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa nāḷ vittūrāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟ koṭṭattu śrī maturāntakac caturvvetimaṅkalattu vaṭapiṭākai Uṭaiyār vittūruṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyaṉāyaṉār
tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāṉa tirumaṭaiviḷākam nāṟpāṟkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa tirumaṭaiviḷākam cūḻnta nañcai puñcaiyum Ēṟum kuṭi ceṭṭikaḷ kaikkoḷar kaṟṟai vaṭavāṇiyar cekkuvāṇikar ceṉaiyaṅkāṭi kovilaṅkāṭi koliyar maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa kācāyavaṟkamu muṭpaṭa Ippaṟṟil koḷḷum pala varikaḷum
palavupātikaḷum Eṭuttaḷavu viruttuppaṭi Aricikāṇamuṭpaṭa sarvvamānyam Iṟaiyiliyāka Uṭaiyār vittūruṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tirunāḷukkum tirupparivaṭṭattukkum tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikku tirumelpūccu tiruppaṇikkum cantirātitta
varai celvatākak koṭuttom Innāḷ mutal Ippaṭi ceyvate §
Digital edition of SII 36.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
